title: Mahendra's Institute is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Mahendra's Institute is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Mahendra's Institute invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Mahendra's Institute:
Mahendra's Institute is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahendra's Institute!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
